summary: Comprehensive testing of Odoo XML-RPC sync engine completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend navigation working with minor data loading timing issues.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent slow data loading causes temporary display of empty states

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints (100% pass rate)
Frontend app loading with odoo.ODS title
All 4 sync panel buttons present and clickable
All 3 tabs (Tables, Sync Jobs, Indexes) functional
Spanish dark theme UI as expected
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend optimization: Add loading states or skeleton UI to improve user experience during API data fetching delays. Consider adding retry logic for API calls.
